name: browser-takeover
description: A local-first AI browser bridge for securely controlling already-open authenticated Chrome and Edge tabs.

interface.shortDescription: Secure local control for authenticated Chrome and Edge tabs.
interface.longDescription: Browser Takeover is a local-first AI browser control layer with visible safety controls, trusted-site restrictions, authenticated localhost bridging, workflow verification, diagnostics, and advanced support for real-world Chrome and Edge pages.
defaultPrompt: List already-open tabs from my normal browser.
Control the logged-in page I already have open.
Check whether my browser is attachable.
